name: Sarah
history: Sarah is in a long-term relationship with Amelia. Amelia has a demanding professional schedule. Sarah feels isolated during the week. Sarah does most household tasks and does not discuss resentment with Amelia. History includes childhood separations from parents associated with distress.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't keep things perfect, I will be criticized.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must be perfect to be accepted.
coping_strategies: Avoids discussing feelings of resentment and dissatisfaction with Amelia.
situation: Not receiving communication from the partner during the day and attempting to make contact.
auto_thought: Amelia doesn't care about me or our relationship.
behavior: Attempts to make contact and feels anxious when there is no response.
